privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the synthetic GNU Health 5.0 demo database. It requires the agent to schedule an appointment for the existing patient 'Ana Betz' (full name Ana Isabel Betz) on 2027-03-15 at 09:30 with urgency 'Normal'. The appointment notes must contain the phrase 'diabetes follow-up', as confirmed by the explicit parameters in the task description.
